records.ety: [OE. garlek, AS. gārlec; gar spear, lance + lec leek. See Gar, n., and Leek.]

defs: A plant of the genus Allium (A. sativum is the cultivated variety), having a bulbous root, a very strong smell, and an acrid, pungent taste. Each root is composed of several lesser bulbs, called cloves of garlic, inclosed in a common membranous coat, and easily separable.
A kind of jig or farce.
